title: Just Play Autumn
description: Just Play in the Autumn — a Halloween-themed modpack with spooky biomes, eerie creatures, and haunting ambience. 🍂🎃
body:
# 🍂 Just Play in the Autumn 🍂

Leaves are falling, pumpkins are glowing, and something spooky is always waiting around the corner… This pack turns Minecraft into an autumn wonderland full of creepy nights, festive foods, haunted landscapes, and a pinch of Halloween magic.

Every step feels alive with the season: the crunch of leaves beneath your feet, the flicker of jack-o’-lanterns lighting the path, the sound of eerie whispers when the fog rolls in. Days feel cozy and calm as you harvest, cook, and decorate, but nights turn tense and thrilling with strange noises, glowing eyes in the dark, and the fear of what’s waiting behind the next tree. It’s a world that’s as inviting as it is unsettling, perfect for players who love both warmth and fright.

## ✨ Features

Spooky Mobs & Bosses 👹
Born in Chaos, Vampirism, Nyctophobia, Ghosts, Gourd Guards, Pumpkillager’s Quest, Unlucky Ghost, Sleepy Hollows and more add vampires, spirits, undead knights, cursed pumpkins, and terrifying bosses.

Haunted World Generation 🌍
Autumnity, Haunted Harvest, The Graveyard, Ghostlands, Spooky Trees, Gardens of the Dead, Wilderness create eerie forests, pumpkin patches, crypts, ghostly biomes, and foggy landscapes.

Atmospheric Events & Weather 🌙
Enhanced Celestials, Zombie Moon, Spider Moon, Hunters Moon, Blood Moons, Immersive Weathering, Fog bring creepy skies, spooky lunar events, storms, and chilling atmospheres.

Seasonal Foods & Festivities 🥧
Farmer’s Delight, Vampires Delight, Silents Delight, Diabolical Delights, LS Spooky Foods add autumn feasts, Halloween candies, eerie brews, and cozy meals.

Dark Magic & Adventure 🔮
Necronomicon, Blood Magic, Forbidden Arcanus, Majrusz’s Difficulty introduce cursed rituals, new bosses, challenging enemies, and dark fantasy progression.

Exploration & Immersion 🧭
Antique Atlas, Waystones, Exposure (camera), Gravestones, Missing Wilds, Create make exploration dangerous but rewarding, while keeping things immersive and creative.

Sound & Music 🎶
Leon’s Spooky Music, Drip Sounds, Sounds add eerie ambient music, creepy noises in caves, and spooky soundscapes for the perfect Halloween vibe.

Performance Boosts ⚡
Embeddium, Rubidium Extra, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Starlight, Cull Leaves, Oculus (shaders), FpsReducer, Fastload keep the frights smooth even with shaders and huge worldgen.

## ❓ FAQ

Q: Can I play this in multiplayer?
A: Yes! The pack works in both singleplayer and multiplayer (environment: Client & Server – required on both).

Q: Do I need a powerful PC?
A: Not necessarily. The pack includes performance mods like Embeddium, FerriteCore, and ModernFix, which make it smoother even with shaders.

Q: Does it work with shaders?
A: Yes – Oculus and shader-friendly optimizations are included.

## ⚠️ Known Issues / Tips

Some bosses (e.g., from Born in Chaos) can be very strong at night – make sure to gear up early!

If you use heavy shaders with Distant Horizons, adjust settings to avoid FPS drops.

Optifine is not recommended – Oculus + Embeddium works better here.

## 🎃 Credits

Huge thanks to all mod authors who made this spooky adventure possible.

Special thanks to:
Born in Chaos – by mongoose_artist
👉 CurseForge link https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos
And many more amazing creators (see full modlist in the pack).
